creator: bjk@FreeBSD.org
text: The XFS support was removed from stable/10 (then head) in r247631, as part of the MPSAFE-VFS project.  The XFS kernel code was not safe to operate without the VFS layer automatically grabbing the Giant kernel lock.  The compat code in the VFS to automatically grab the Giant lock was removed to further general improvements to the VFS layer, and will not be reintroduced.  Even read-only support would require substantial work, and I do not expect that it will be forthcoming.
